title: lappula shanhsiensis
intro: Lappula shanhsiensis, also known as Chinese bugloss, is a perennial herbaceous plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lappula shanhsiensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
